text:
Market today: Tech and chip names are getting a quiet boost from AI infrastructure news — OpenAI's first chip built with Broadcom is the real signal today. That's a direct catalyst for your semiconductor and AI-heavy book. Mood is cautiously risk-on but fragile.

Your holdings: AVGO is your biggest problem — down 12.4% and it's your largest position, so margin exposure here is real and painful. PLTR is down 9.9% with no clear near-term support story today. PTNM is down 15.25% — tiny spec on margin is the most dangerous combination you own. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with almost no data; margin amplifies any sudden drop fast.

Watch: 1) AVGO reaction to the OpenAI-Broadcom chip news — this is a direct read on whether your largest position gets relief. 2) Whether PLTR holds above your $85 stop as sentiment shifts.

Bottom line: Protect AVGO and cut PTNM — those two on margin are where your real overnight risk lives right now.
